case_title: DACIAN CALHOUN VS. UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALHOUN, DACIAN AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-09-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2020 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE AND FURTHER TESTIMONY TO JUN-18-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S AMENDED CLAIM. PLAINTIFF DACIAN CALHOUN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, REPRESENTED BY ALLISON GORDON, PARALEGAL IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETURNED AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED AND KEPT WITH THE FILE. . ** SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT ** JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2020 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO FEB-20-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. FILE IS KEPT IN COURT. PLAINTIFF DACIAN CALHOUN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC., REPRESENTED BY ALISON GORDON, PARALEGAL IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS DIRECTED TO FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM WHICH CLARIFIES HIS CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT UBER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE AMENDED CLAIM IS WAIVED. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE A COPY OF THE AMENDED CLAIM TO UBERS LEGAL DEPARTMENT AT 1455 MARKET ST. 4TH FLOOR, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED AND ARE KEPT WITH THE FILE FOR THE HEARING ON 2-20-20. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,999.00 FILED BY CALHOUN, DACIAN AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
DECLARATION OF DACIAN CALHOUN RE: HEARING AMENDMENT EXPLANATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALHOUN, DACIAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2020 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-17-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ALLISON GORDON, PARALEGAL FILED BY DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALHOUN, DACIAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
